action.description:
Introduced by Representatives DeSanto, J. Jacobson, Tenorio, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, DeSmidt, Johnson, Clancy, Joers, Goodwin, Madison, Haywood, Doyle, Miresse, Fitzgerald, Udell, McCarville, Hysell, Roe, Anderson, Kirsch, Palmeri, Mayadev, Stroud, Billings, Prado, Bare, Rivera-Wagner, Phelps, Hong, Emerson, Sinicki, Andraca, Snodgrass, Brown, Stubbs, Arney, Subeck and Vining; 
cosponsored by Senators Pfaff, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Ratcliff, Wall, Keyeski, Roys, Spreitzer, Hesselbein, Carpenter, Habush Sinykin, Wirch and Larson
